hero.headline: Data and Analytics Consulting That Drives Business Growth

sections.html: Designing secure, scalable data architectures with clear ownership, access controls, and definitions—so teams trust the data and regulators do too.
Migrating data platforms and analytics workloads to modern cloud environments with minimal downtime, validated results, and careful coordination across downstream teams.

Building and maintaining production-grade data systems—including ingestion pipelines, transformation logic, and analytics-ready data models—
so downstream reporting and applications are reliable and easy to extend.
Building self-serve dashboards with clear, agreed-upon metrics—so leaders trust the numbers and teams act on them.
Using AI and machine learning where they add real value, deploying models that are transparent, auditable, and integrated into existing data platforms.

Designing and building custom data-driven applications that capture, unify, and operationalize business-critical data so teams can run operations, make faster decisions, and gain visibility into their systems. We focus on solutions where data is central to the workflow, integrating seamlessly with your existing data platform to deliver scalable, secure, and high-impact software.

Designing and building custom data-driven applications that capture, unify, and operationalize business-critical data so teams can run operations, make faster decisions, and gain visibility into their systems.

We focus on solutions where data is central to the workflow, integrating seamlessly with your existing data platform to deliver scalable, secure, and high-impact software.
We design and build data systems the way we would for our own teams—clean architecture, clear models, and production-ready delivery.
No black boxes. We explain what we’re building, why it matters, and how it works, so your team can operate it with confidence.

seo.title: Data Analytics, Integration & Intelligence Solutions | DSC
seo.description: Data Solutions Consulting builds reliable data platforms for Canadian businesses with consulting, engineering, and analytics solutions. Get in touch today.
